character.name: MURROW
character.prompt: Late-20s Polish male archivist, slim slightly stooped, neat short sandy blonde hair with side part, reading glasses pushed up, threadbare warm-brown wool blazer over white shirt and skinny dark tie, navy trousers, ink-stained fingers. Polish komiks illustration, clean ink-line outlines, flat warm earth-tone colors, PRL-era mood, 128×128 pixel-art, full body, hands at sides. Palette: #d4b878, #e6b08a, #1c2a40, #e8e4d8, #6a4a30, #0d0a08
